headline: Avery Dennison Launches Clima™ Window Films for Advanced Solar Control
summary: Avery Dennison has announced the launch of its new Clima Architectural Window Films series. Engineered for commercial and luxury residential properties, this advanced portfolio delivers intelligent solar control and superior energy efficiency, enabling architects and developers to enhance building performance without sacrificing visual appeal.
